explanation: The requirement 'PCV Mode: The breath cycle shall start with the inspiration phase.' states that when in Pressure Controlled Ventilation Mode (PCVMode), each new breath cycle must begin with the inspiratory phase. Mapping the intent to the available atomic propositions, 'PCVMode' indicates we are in PCV mode, 'breathingCycleStart' indicates start of a breath cycle, and 'inspiratoryPhaseStart' means the start of the inspiration phase. The requirement constrains the start of each breathing cycle (breathingCycleStart) to also coincide with the start of the inspiratory phase (inspiratoryPhaseStart). Thus, whenever a breath cycle starts in PCV mode, the system must also activate the inspiration phase at the same moment. This is captured as: whenever 'PCVMode & breathingCycleStart', at the next timepoint satisfy 'inspiratoryPhaseStart'.
